title: LLM-Wiki Conversion-Oracle Sample Manifest
description: Schema for sample-manifest.yaml — 20 stratified oracle fixture entries.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier unique within the manifest.

encoding_stress.description: True iff page contains UTF-8 Greek letters, degree signs, or math operators.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the HTML snapshot was captured.

html_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the html_path file content.

html_path.description: Repo-relative path to the frozen HTML snapshot.

oracle_md_path.description: Repo-relative path to the oracle markdown file.

oracle_authored_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of initial oracle authorship.

oracle_second_reviewer.description: GitHub handle of second reviewer, OR 'self-reviewed-with-24h-delay'.

oracle_reviewed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of re-review (required when single_reviewer_timelag=true).

single_reviewer_timelag.description: True iff oracle_second_reviewer is the sentinel string.
